/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/brotlidec.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libbrotlidec.so.1 -o libbrotlidec.so.1.2.0 CMakeFiles/brotlidec.dir/c/dec/bit_reader.c.o CMakeFiles/brotlidec.dir/c/dec/decode.c.o CMakeFiles/brotlidec.dir/c/dec/huffman.c.o CMakeFiles/brotlidec.dir/c/dec/prefix.c.o CMakeFiles/brotlidec.dir/c/dec/state.c.o CMakeFiles/brotlidec.dir/c/dec/static_init.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/lex_is1/Documents/Google/brotli-master/build_patch: -lm libbrotlicommon.so.1.2.0 -lm
